title: Mekagon
description: A modpack with lots of optimization, dragons, tech, and multiplayer.
body:
This is a very basic modpack that is super optimimized for any PC with great shaders and dragons and tech and friends. It can be played in singleplayer and multiplayer with essential and is very fun fights with friends. It has mekanism for tech and ice and fire for dragons, so have a blast fighting dragons with a flamethrower. Have Fun!!

If you like fighting dragons, and using tech to help get to fighting those dragons, this is a pack for you!

### **I OWN NOTHING**
